Special Assessment Description: Road improvement district assessment, payable over 5 years.
Public Remarks: Exceptional multi-family investment opportunity — 8-unit apartment complex in established Clearwater neighborhood. All units currently rented. Recent roof replacement (2021), updated electrical panels. On-site laundry, off-street parking. Strong rental history with long-term tenants. Cap rate approximately 7.2%.
Directions: From US-19 head west on Drew St, left on Highland Ave, right on Palms Avenue. Property on left, large complex with parking lot.
